ogTitle: Traralgon South vs Trawalla: Climate Safety

heading: Traralgon South vs Trawalla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Traralgon South, Victoria and Trawalla, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Traralgon South has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Trawalla (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Traralgon South or Trawalla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Traralgon South has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Trawalla scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Traralgon South scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Trawalla scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Traralgon South or Trawalla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Traralgon South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
